workflow_priorities.label: Warehouse
workflow_priorities.whyNow: Start with one sub-10,000 sq ft bay only after site authorization and export-control screening are confirmed.

priority_proof_targets.name: Durham Logistics Center (subscale empty-bay candidate)
priority_proof_targets.corridor: Operator route for one empty or pre-tenant bay inside Durham Logistics Center. Do not treat the full facility as proof-ready.
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Start with one sub-10,000 sq ft bay only after site authorization and export-control screening are confirmed.

priority_proof_targets.name: Durham Logistics Center (leasing route candidate)
priority_proof_targets.corridor: Leasing-route contact for the same Durham Logistics Center scope. Use only after confirming operator permission path and subscale bay target.
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Useful as a leasing-route introduction, but still validation-required for lawful access.

priority_proof_targets.name: Welcome Venture Park (candidate only)
priority_proof_targets.corridor: Adjacent Durham logistics candidate. Keep blocked until the exact subspace, operator path, and rights posture are explicit.
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Do not promote as proof-ready or launch-ready.

queued_lawful_access_buckets.rationale: Expand only after the first research-backed proof assets and rights-cleared reviews exist.
